title: KitchenCraft Wire Deep Fryer Basket, 18.5 cm (to Fit 2 cm Chip Pan), Silver
features: What’s for dinner? Steak and chips? Make generous batches of golden, crunchy fries with this handy chip pan basket
This one’s a keeper! It has a robust wire-mesh basket, plus clever, integrated rests to help keep it stable in your pan
Forget the hassle of a bulky deep fat fryer. Just grab this lightweight basket, pop it in a pan and get frying
Use for all your fried treats. Cook crunchy crisps and potato wedges. And go retro with crispy fried scampi, or tempting onion rings
This chip frying basket measures 18.5 cm (7½"), to fit 2 cm (8") pans. It's dishwasher safe and comes with a 12 month guarantee
description: From the manufacturer The Definitive Kitchenware Brand KitchenCraft is the definitive kitchenware brand, with more than 1,300 everyday kitchen essentials to help you cook, bake and decorate. KitchenCraft Chip Pan Frying Basket (For 20 cm Pans) Fancy A Fry-Up? Keep The Whole Family Happy With This Generous Fryer Basket When’s the last time you enjoyed homemade chips? Really? That long? Grab this chip frying basket from KitchenCraft, and get cooking crispy, crunchy plates of golden-coloured chips. Robustly constructed, it’s a generous size, so you can cook big batches of chips – great for if you’re catering for two or three people. Simply pop it in a panful of oil, throw in some fresh-cut spuds, and serve up with pizza, steak or salad. Or cook up crunchy chicken nuggets, and serve with sweet petits pois and baby carrots. When you’re suffering a snack attack, make onion rings, scampi and tempura, and serve, tapas-style, in little bowls. Or use to cook fresh-fried doughnuts with a sweet dusting of sugar. Naughty but very, very nice. This round chip frying basket has an integrated handle and side rests, so it sits comfortably in your pan, and is easy to manoeuvre. So leave that bulky electric fryer in the cupboard. This lightweight basket makes it quick and easy. Designed to fit 20 cm (8-inch) saucepans Diameter: 18.5 cm (7½ inches) Depth (external): 9.5 cm (3½ inches) Length: 34.5 cm (13½ inches) Dishwasher safe Delicious Deep-Fried Food Made Easy Big, tasty fry-ups Nothing beats an indulgent fry-up. With this large mesh frying basket, you can cook up big batches of chips and potato wedges, and get ready to indulge. Use for chicken nuggets and onion rings The mesh design of this fryer ensures optimum crispiness for treats such as onion rings and chicken nuggets. Break out the dips, and start setting the table! Make delicious tempura Use this frying basket whenever you want to, to fry delicious crispy Thai tempura. Simply coat fish and vegetable morsels with seasoned or spiced batter, then plunge into a pan of hot oil for a few moments. Key Features Strong and durable Look after this wire chip basket and you’ll be making fab fry-ups for years to come. With its strong mesh design, there’s no chance of cuts or nicks from loose and broken wires. Use as a colander Do you dread having to handle a heavy, cumbersome colander whenever you’re cooking vegetables? Use this lightweight wire basket instead. It’s easy to handle and manoeuvre, so there’s less chance of spilling hot water everywhere, while you’re draining. Great for small spaces Bulky deep fat fryers are never going to cut it whenever space is at a premium. This frying basket can be used in one of your everyday saucepans. Perfect for tiny kitchens with limited storage. Caravans and motorhomes, too. About KitchenCraft The definitive kitchenware brand. Since 1850, KitchenCraft has designed, manufactured and supplied thousands of cooking utensils, tools and gadgets, each playing an important role in the kitchens of customers across the UK. With more than 1,000 products to choose from, there’s always a KitchenCraft product you can rely on - from essentials for every day to the exceptional.
